mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER ( MEMBERID, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, TYPE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_AT, DORMANT_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, MUST_CHANGE_PASSWORD_YN, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{type}, #{status}, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{mustChangePasswordYn}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{gender, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_AUTHORITY (AUTH_NUM, FK_MEMBERID, AUTHORITY) VALUES (SEQ_MEMBER_AUTHORITY_AUTH_NUM.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{authority})

INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY ( FK_MEMBERID, COMPANY_NAME, BIZ_NO, INDUSTRY_CODE, CEO_NAME, APPROVED_YN, APPROVAL_AT, REJECT_REASON, INFO_CREATED_AT, INFO_UPDATED_AT, ZIP_CODE, ADDR1, ADDR2, LAT, LNG ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{companyName}, #{bizNo}, #{industryCode}, #{ceoName}, 0, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{zipCode}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{lat, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lng, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId , PASSWORD AS password , TYPE AS type , STATUS AS status FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
SELECT AUTHORITY FROM TBL_MEMBER_AUTHORITY WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} ORDER BY AUTH_NUM
